about.desc: Our goal is to simplify your path through our international consultancy: softlanding, legal, financial, tax, foreign trade and audit services.
about.heading: SIMPLIFYING THE PROCESSES...

mision.title: Mission
mision.text: To provide comprehensive solutions in accounting, tax and legal advisory, as well as foreign trade and auditing — all under one roof. We position ourselves as a strategic partner that fully adapts to each client's needs at every stage of their growth. We facilitate the connection between Mexican and foreign corporate cultures, deeply understanding the challenges and requirements of each company. Our priority is to offer expert, personalized guidance, ensuring regulatory compliance, process optimization and the sustained success of our clients in a globalized environment.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a leading company in all the areas we cover, standing out professionally, technically and personally, valuing each of our team members and ensuring their wellbeing. We aspire to be an example to follow.

valores.title: Values
valores.text: At SAETA we are professionals by excellence. We always strive to improve individually and as a team in order to deliver premium quality work. We never forget our human values: respect, trust, punctuality, humility, honesty, transparency and above all, empathy.

unete.title: Join Us
unete.text: We are looking for committed talent. If you want to be part of a company in constant international growth, check our openings on LinkedIn.

services.heading: Our services
services.sub: We are a leading company providing business consulting services. We customize our services to adapt to you and work as your partner. We "simplify" corporate processes to make them easy, clear and transparent. Main services: softlanding, legal, tax, financial, audit, payroll and foreign trade advisory.

cta.title: Do you need a customized service?
cta.sub: We adapt to your company, industry and specific objectives.

softlanding.title: Softlanding
softlanding.desc: Incorporation, training on local legal and tax regulations and regulatory compliance, headhunting and recruitment of local employees.

legales.title: Legal
legales.desc: Labor, Social Security, Corporate, Commercial, Civil, M&A, Immigration, Intellectual Property, Data Protection, Anti-Money Laundering and License & Permit Management.

contabilidad.title: Accounting
contabilidad.desc: Monthly and Annual Tax Returns, Tax Procedures, General Advisory, Transfer Pricing, Controlling, Forecasting, Budget, Planning and Invoicing.

payroll.title: Payroll & Treasury
payroll.desc: Payroll, Treasury (management of bank accounts in different currencies).

comercio.title: Foreign Trade
comercio.desc: Tax and customs advisory in foreign trade. Solutions in international and business logistics, compliance with official standards, Data Stage audit, fixed asset control audit and diagnosis, preventive audit of foreign trade operations. Compliance with permits and non-tariff rules.

auditoria.title: Audit
auditoria.desc: Financial Statement Audit, Tax Audit, International Financial Reporting Standards (IFRS).

team.heading: Team SAETA
team.sub: Passionate professionals committed to simplifying your business, present in Puebla and Mexico City.
team.cta: Do you want to be part of the team?

stats.tagline: "We are the compass your company needs to navigate the corporate world."

languages.heading: We speak your language
languages.sub: SAETA operates in three languages to eliminate communication barriers in every corporate process.

es.label: Primary
es.desc: Our operational language. We serve national and Latin American companies with complete fluency.

en.label: International
en.desc: We serve international companies expanding into Mexico with full English-language advisory support.

de.label: International
de.desc: We support German-speaking companies in their expansion to Mexico and Latin America.

languages.clickHint: Click on a card to switch the page language

contact.heading: Let's talk about your company
contact.sub: Schedule a free consultation with our team. We analyze your situation at no cost and propose the most appropriate action plan.
contact.mensajePlaceholder: Briefly tell us about your company and what you need...
contact.required: Please fill in all fields before submitting.
contact.successSub: We will get in touch with you within 24 business hours.

footer.tagline: Your corporate compass. We simplify processes so you can grow.
